title: Compellor
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:418CompellorAtX7Gallofree-BOP.jpg]] |name=''Compellor'' |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type=[[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=Interdiction |commission= |destroyed=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] |retired= |battles=*[[Skirmish near Almaran]] *[[Attack on the Compellor|Attack on the ''Compellor'']] *[[Ambush in the Goff system]] *[[Battle of Swellen]] *[[First attack on the Peregrine]] *[[Retreat from Gallofree]] |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |navy= |fleet= |owners= |captains=[[Rigell]] |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} The '''''Compellor''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Rigell]]. It was stolen by members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], who removed its [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]] and then scuttled the ship. ==History== During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ''Compellor'' was assigned to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wooyou Senn|Senn's]] [[Task Force Vengeance]], as a key tactical vessel in the mission to assimilate the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam Sector]] into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Paired in a small battle group with the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']], ''Compellor'' acted as a powerful tool in hunting down hiding Rebels and [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam]] pirates. When the fleet encountered an enemy staging area, the ''Compellor'' prevented the enemy from escaping into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The Rebels were quick to understand the tactical importance of the ''Compellor'' and repeatedly tried to destroy it without success. It survived an [[Attack on the Compellor|assault]] by [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] of [[Viper Squadron (Rebel Alliance)|Viper]] and [[Phoenix Squadron/Legends|Phoenix Squadrons]], and was ordered to [[Repair Yard]] [[KDY-77 repair yard|''KDY-77'']] in the [[Swellen system/Legends|Swellen system]] to have an anti-warhead missile defense system installed. En route, it was diverted to join [[Battlegroup Orion]] in the [[ambush in the Goff system]], where ''Compellor'' was the only ship to escape the Rebel trap. [[File:Compellor_before_explosion.jpg|left|thumb|[[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class stormtrooper transport]] trying to board the interdictor ''Compellor'' just before its self-destruction]] Subsequently, the Rebels tracked it to the repair facility, captured the interdictor during the [[Battle of Swellen]], and took it to an Airam [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility|X7 Factory]] facility in the [[Mobetta system/Legends|Mobetta system]]. There, the Rebels removed the gravity well projectors from the damaged vessel and incorporated them into the modified [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class cruiser]] [[Peregrine (Strike-class)|''Peregrine'']]. Once the ''Peregrine'' left the facility, an Imperial search group located the now useless interdictor. Sending in a flight of [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class stormtrooper transports]] to investigate the dead vessel, the Imperials were taken by surprise when the ''Compellor'', rigged with explosives, exploded from within. All the transports were destroyed along with the cruiser, erasing all evidence of the Rebels' possession of the gravity well projectors and opening the [[retreat from Gallofree]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' *''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}} [[Category:Captured starships]] [[Category:Immobilizer 418 cruisers]] [[Category:Starships of Task Force Vengeance]] [[Category:Starships of the Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
